hypothesis: SP500 may replace correlated NDX risk more efficiently than a proportional dilution of all incumbent sleeves.

selection.required: strict improvement over control in both threshold and adverse bar fills
selection.tie_break: maximum of the smaller normal/adverse pass-rate delta, then lower weight

candidate_limitations: Standalone current-cost pooled PF passes, but annual density and quality gates fail.
Any surviving result remains research-only and cannot authorize deployment.
label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
